identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with Cyberpunk density.
Data is Art: Charts and metrics are the heroes, not illustrations.
Dark Mode First: Designed for low-light, high-focus environments.
Contrast is King: Neon accents on deep obsidian backgrounds.

inputs.style: bg-[#171717] border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on #050505 background is at least #A1A1AA or lighter.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and font families defined above.
3. OVERRIDE SHADCN: Update index.css CSS variables to match the 'Deep Obsidian' palette. Do not use the default slate/zinc colors.
4. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component with a fixed sidebar and sticky header.
5. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn primitives but style them with the 'cards.style' and 'buttons.primary' rules.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style tooltips to be dark glassmorphism.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
